column1: # Velocity Dispersion Literature Compilation for SH0ES Host Galaxies
# MASTER FILE with full provenance documentation
# Every value traces to a peer-reviewed publication via ADS bibcode.
# All entries include date accessed for audit trail.
#   sigma_kms: Central velocity dispersion in km/s
#   source_bibcode: ADS bibcode of source publication
#   source_url: URL to ADS abstract page
#   notes: Provenance notes including corrections and caveats
#   traceability_confidence: HIGH (direct stellar absorption) or MEDIUM (HI proxy or large uncertainty)
#   date_accessed: Date data was retrieved from source
# DO NOT EDIT WITHOUT UPDATING AUDIT TRAIL AND REGENERATING ALL RESULTS.

column7: notes
Héraudeau+1999 HyperLEDA compilation (LEDA ref HSMP99). Direct stellar absorption measurement. HyperLEDA: 108.0 ± 23.0 km/s.
Campbell+2014 6dFGSv Fundamental Plane (LEDA ref 52286). Direct stellar absorption measurement. 6dFGSv: 106.5 ± 6.6 km/s.
Héraudeau+1999 HyperLEDA compilation (LEDA ref WM). HyperLEDA: 89.0 ± 29.0 km/s. Measurement has large uncertainty; value is consistent with HyperLEDA within errors.
Kormendy&Ho2013 Table 1 compilation. Direct stellar absorption measurement. Literature value 151 km/s matches source.
Campbell+2014 6dFGSv. W50=270 km/s → σ≈95 via HyperLEDA calibrated proxy. Literature value matches.
Riess+2022 SH0ES calibrator host compilation. Literature value 73 km/s matches source.

Ho+2009 ApJS 183 Table 1 via HyperLEDA (LEDA ref 51827). HyperLEDA reports 55.7 ± 24.5 km/s. Previous value of 88.0 km/s was from an undocumented source and has been replaced with the traceable HyperLEDA value. The large uncertainty reflects measurement uncertainty in this galaxy.
Kormendy&Ho2013 Table 1. Direct measurement. Literature value 238 matches source.
